title: The Finance Commission (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act, 1951
full_text: The Finance Commission (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act, 1951 वित्त आयोग (प्रकीर्ण उपबंध) अधिनियम, 1951 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1951-33 Act Number: 33 Enactment Date: 1951-05-16 Act Year: 1951 Short Title: The Finance Commission (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act, 1951 Hindi Title: वित्त आयोग (प्रकीर्ण उपबंध) अधिनियम, 1951 Long Title: An Act to determine the qualifications requisite for appointment as members of the Finance Commission and the manner in which they shall be selected, and to prescribe their powers. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Economic Affairs Enforcement Date: 16-05-1951 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Finance Commission (Miscellaneous Provisions) Act, 1951 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definition. Section 3. Qualifications for appointment as, and the manner of selection of, members of the Commission. Section 4. Personal interest to disqualify members. Section 5. Disqualifications for being a member of the Commission. Section 6. Term of office of members and eligibility for reappointment. Section 7. Conditions of service and salaries and allowances of members. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Procedure and powers of the Commission.
